block.caption: (d) shows that the $\mathrm{C} = \mathrm{C} = \mathrm{C}$ axis in allene is an $S_{4}$ axis. The plane across which reflection takes place may or may not be a plane of symmetry; in allene it is not, but in $\mathrm{BF}_3$ , shown in Figure 4.3(b), the plane involved in the $S_{3}$ operation is the $\sigma_{h}$ plane. This example also illustrates the point that, if there is a $\sigma_{h}$ plane perpendicular to the highest-fold $C_{n}$ axis, this axis must be an $S_{n}$ axis also.
